---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenOBA
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

*Example: "I need to batch-update 500 product prices at once, but currently I have to do it one by one."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternative Approaches

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Impact

- **Who benefits**: [e.g., operators, developers, end users]
- **Ecosystem**: [e.g., ERDL skeleton, Skill, Core engine, ERA-Chat, deployment]
- **Urgency**: [e.g., blocker, important, nice-to-have]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
